description: To indicate or point toward meaning; to carry significance. 'Shelo' names what signs do—the pointing that connects symbol to substance.
sound_symbolism: The word indicates gently. 'She' softly opens with subtle gesture, sign appearing. 'Lo' opens with clear direction, meaning indicated.
grammatical_notes: Functions as verb: 'mi shelo' (I signify). What points to 'meru' (meaning). Related to 'relo' (symbol) as the act of symbolic pointing.

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Signs as empty—signifiers point but have no inherent meaning, only conventional.
pillars.peace-linguistics-practices: Clear signification—communicating so meaning reaches the listener accurately.
